artifacts.title: Only receipt from 2021-12-05
artifacts.excerpt: Optimization leads to fragility because it removes randomness. Optimal values only exist in relativity to their environment, and the environment never reveals itself fully. When errors can be corrected while still small, randomness becomes your ally. Via negativa. @paulportesi
